programme.title: Future Card Buddyfight
programme.desc: It is the year 2030, and the stage is the capital of Japan, Chou-Tokyo. Through "Buddyfight", humans have started cultural interactions with residents from other worlds called "Affinity Dimensions". Buddyfight is a game with selected humans as the "Buddyfighter", and residents from the other world as the partner (known as "Buddy Monster"). These battles have high significance and sometimes it is even used to decide the fate of a nation, and naturally there are those who seek to use the Buddy Monsters for evil purposes.

programme.title: I'll Get You! Holiday
programme.desc: The action takes place in all year round resort, where Wolf doesn't chase Hare to eat him anymore: now it's all about sports and competition. However, in his crazy chase after recognition and victories the grey hooligan often uses methods that aren't really fair, which provokes awkward and funny situations.

programme.title: Bat Pat
programme.desc: The series follows the comedy adventures of Bat Pat and the Silver brothers Martin, Leo and Rebecca as they unravel mysteries and cross paths with supernatural creatures of the night that lurk, haunt, shriek and dig themselves up in every dark corner of their home in Fogville, a small town that seems to be the center of all things weird in the world, a veritable magnet to ghosts, mummies, witches, creatures, werewolves and things that go bump in the night. Bat Pat will prove that the supernatural isn't always evil but just misunderstood. Our heroes will come to understand something important: the supernatural “bad guys” are not really bad, but normal people whose actions are misunderstood by the more inhabitants of Fogville and what they really want is... just help!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green's new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he's the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: TOBOT
programme.desc: Ryan and Kory are twin brothers with one big secret: They're Tobot pilots.

programme.title: Roger
programme.desc: The lively adventures of a little girl, the carefree, joyful and occasionally perky Fatou, and an alien, the clumsy Roger, on a tropical island… Throughout their adventures, they trigger small accidents that sometimes grow into major disasters, but (almost) always end on a happy note. In short, Roger and Fatou spend their time saving the island from their own mistakes and blunders.

programme.title: Camp Cool Kids
programme.desc: At their summer camp competition games, Spence and his big brother Zach find themselves on opposing teams: it's the dweebs against the bullies. Can Spence make new friends, overcome his fears, stand up to the bullies and win a trophy in the process?

But Shelley also wanted to do some tricks and she with Greg made a real show for Zibidi and Booboo! / On a very hot day Greg felt thirsty, so he went to the kitchen to have some water. But the floor was very hot, it was so hot it burned Greg's feet. So he had to dance across the kitchen to get to the water. / Here comes a new fun cartoon for toddlers! In this episode, we'll see how a small piece of popcorn causes a lot trouble but it all turns out great in the end. One day, a big yummy piece of popcorn fell into Greg's cage. / In this episode, Greg figures out that no matter how annoying your friends might sometimes be, they are still the most important thing a hamster can have. One day Greg was taking a nap. He was really focused on the task, so it was a serious nap.

programme.title: Mr. Monkey, Monkey Mechanic: Mr. Giraffe's Car Is Too Small / Mr. Chameleon's Car Needs New Paint / Mrs. Penguin's Ice Cream Truck Is Too Hot
programme.desc: Today, Mr. Giraffe pays a visit to Mr. Monkey, Monkey Mechanic's garage! Ever since he's been driving his car, his neck has been really sore. Mr. Monkey checks his car, and it turns out it's in tiptop shape! But, Mr. Giraffe's neck is not. It hurts! It must have something to do with his car. So, Mr. Monkey comes up with a plan, which of course, involves his trusty monkey wrench! / Mr. Monkey, Monkey Mechanic is so happy to have his friend Mr. Chameleon visit his garage today! Mr. Chamelon has a special talent, his color changes to whatever he color he's wearing. He asks Mr. Monkey to change the color of his favorite shirt, red. Mr. Monkey happily paints the car. As soon as he drives away, Mr. Chameleon is back, wearing another color and wanting another paint job! / It's a sweltering hot day when Mrs. Penguin drops in at Mr. Monkey, Monkey Mechanic's garage with a big problem - the ice cream in her truck is melting! After inspecting the ice cream truck, Mr. Monkey comes up with an idea and puts his trusty monkey wrench to use. But, is the solution cool enough to keep her ice cream cold?

The wind can be used for all kinds of things, like making strange-shaped monsters with paint, and for making electricity on the wind farm we visit on our field trip. It's a windy day inside the classroom!

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: A hilarious performer, Adam has been seen on IFC's “The Birthday Boys,” HBO's “Got No Game,” and TBS's “Lopez Tonight.” His stand up has been featured on Nickelodeon's “NickMom,” Hulu's “West Coast Funnies” “Tell Your Friends: The Concert Film,” “The CoExist Comedy Tour” documentary, “ComedyTime,” as well as heard worldwide on Sirius|XM Radio.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Russ has become recognized in the entertainment industry for achieving more laughs per minute than any comedian working the circuit today and has also been seen on The Nashville Network, A&E's Comedy on the Road, Showtime's Comedy Club Network, the WB, Spike TV, Comedy Central and the list goes on and on. Being a 26+ year veteran of the comedy stage, Russ keeps the laughs coming fast and furious with an array of topics ranging from family and marriage, to travel and current events, and yes he even throws in some biker stuff too.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: JJ Barrows was raised in South Carolina as the middle child of a preacher's family. Having always felt a little different, JJ uses humor to navigate through the realities of life.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: After forty years performing a blend of stand-up, story, and shtick, Bob Stromberg brings his style to the trials of aging.

programme.title: Marc Yaffee
programme.desc: Adopted at birth and confused ever since, Marc takes his audiences on a comedy joyride as he explores his multi-ethnic roots and the culture clashes that fill his world. Marc's smart but relatable comedy demonstrates a universal appeal that has landed him appearances on PBS, Comics Unleashed, The Latino Laugh Festival and the Showtime special, Goin' Native. Funny not filthy, Marc serves audiences his original comedy recipe, specially prepared for non- stop laughs. Tasty topics, spicy premises and savory punchlines, are all dished out with a dash of sarcasm and a grain of salt. A regular in Las Vegas, Marc has performed six times overseas for Armed Forces Entertainment and he's a past winner of Ventura Comedy Festival's Funniest Person Contest.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: My Life As I Know It Now
programme.desc: With an act that crosses all boundaries, B.T. will surely have you rolling with laughter. His physical performance style and charm landed him two performances on NBC's Friday Night Videos and a performance at the prestigious HBO U.S. Comedy Arts Festival. B.T. has also appeared on BET's Comic View, MTV's The Jenny McCarthy Show, and FOX's The Keenan Ivory Wayans Show.

programme.title: Don Barnhart
programme.desc: Don's ability to keep audiences of all ages howling with laughter and coming back for more is what separates him from the average joke teller.

programme.title: David Dyer
programme.desc: David Dyer has been performing at stand-up at comedy clubs and corporate events for over twenty years. He's worked with some of the best comics in the industry including Mike Birbiglia, Jim Breuer, and Lewis Black. He's been a contributing writer to NBC's Late Night with Jimmy Fallon and ABC's Politically Incorrect. He's a regular on the nationally syndicated Bob and Tom Show and often appears on the roster for their “Friends of The Bob and Tom Show” comedy tour. He's the host of a new web series called Sidecar Sessions where he interviews guests who are sitting in the sidecar of his motorcycle as David pilots the bike around town. David also created and stars in another web series called Pillars with co-star, Kevin Yon. David became an on-call firefighter with Grand Rapids Township in Michigan….his wife is nervous.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Greg Warren is a nationally touring headliner and has been featured on Late Night with Seth Meyers, Last Comic Standing, Comedy Central Presents, The Late Late Show with Craig Ferguson, BET and CMT. Greg is a fan favorite on the nationally syndicated Bob and Tom Radio Show and can be heard daily on Sirius/XM.

programme.desc: The stars of MST3K bring their comedic riffing treatment to this short that follows a young country boy as he tries to re-adjust to living in his new home in the big city. Join Mike, Kevin and Bill as they take a trip with William From Georgia to Harlem!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this David Carradine action classic about a bounty hunter who must protect a woman reporter from a gang of renegade cops. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Future Force!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this cheesy 50's sci-fi classic! It's a tale of a man who transforms into a violent lizard creature whenever he is in the sun too long! Join Mike, Kevin and Bill for The Hideous Sun Demon!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this short about a boy who has to take his goat to the market. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Zlateh the Goat!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: This movie has it all and then some: romance, political intrigue, studying, rich uncles, big bands, familial strife, journalism, jazz, soda fountains, swing dance, real estate, and a prom! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Bridget and Mary Jo from RiffTrax (formerly of Mystery Science Theater 3000).

programme.title: The Argument
programme.desc: When a couple has an argument at a party, and neither will admit to being wrong, they decide to recreate the evening again and again in order to determine who was right. But this leads to even more confusion, and soon everyone is arguing.

programme.title: Senior Love Triangle
programme.desc: An 84-year old charming but delusional WWII veteran forms relationships with two elderly women and goes on a crusade to save them from the isolation of their retirement homes in east Hollywood. Starring Travis Van Winkle and Tom Bower

programme.title: Still Today
programme.desc: After being left at the altar, Pete's groomsman give him a wedding gift he'll never forget. An escort. Maybe it's the Lunar eclipse, maybe it's fate, but after a magical night in the city maybe this girl is what Pete needed all along.

programme.title: Just for Showmance
programme.desc: Tara marries Joe, a stranger as part of a TV show, but soon starts to fall for him after all.

programme.title: FBI: Negotiator
programme.desc: An FBI agent must negotiate with a woman holding a hospital hostage in order to get her hands on an experimental drug.

programme.title: Love on the Reef
programme.desc: A marine biologist and a laissez-faire dive instructor must team up to save their beloved reef.

programme.title: A Royal Makeover
programme.desc: When Ramone discovers he is about to be King, he takes lessons from royal expert Angelica.

programme.title: The Christmas Wife
programme.desc: A widower (Jason Robards) not wanting to face his first Christmas alone responds to an ad for social introductions and enlists the services of forlorn escort, Iris (Julie Harris) to be his “Christmas Wife”. A holiday classic!

programme.title: An Old Fashioned Thanksgiving
programme.desc: On a poor New Hampshire farm in 1860's America, family ties are tested during the Thanksgiving holiday when a wealthy, bitter woman pays an unexpected visit to her estranged daughter and grandchildren.

programme.title: The Mayflower Madam
programme.desc: Inspired by the life of Sydney Biddle Barrows, this film depicts Miss Barrows who, for four years, led a double life.

programme.title: The Wild Girl
programme.desc: Chicago photojournalist Ned Giles heads out west to join the 1932 Great Apache Expedition-an arduous trek into the Sierra Madre Mountains to rescue a seven-year-old boy kidnapped by the Apache Indians.

programme.title: China Rose
programme.desc: A man arrives in China to search for his son, whom he hasn't seen in many years. A female American Embassy employee, who knows the country and speaks the language, is assigned to assist him, but soon they run into more trouble than they expected.

programme.title: Go Back
programme.desc: Ji-won, a motivated new police officer, is strangely bothered after meeting O-sun, a social worker. On a hot summer day, a kidnapper sends a message saying, ‘If you want to save the kidnapped child, donate money to the welfare center.' The incident becomes a national concern as the media report it. Somehow, Ji-won doubts the link between the case and O-sun.

programme.title: Mission Possible
programme.desc: To a private investigator Woo Su-han, who will take on any job if it pays the bill, a secret agent Yoo Da-hee comes along with $10,000 in cash. She proposes a joint operation to investigate an arms trafficking case. They attract more attention when they're together and as the scope of this case increases by the minute, they leave behind evidence that put them on police's target list...

programme.title: Welcome to Dongmakgol
programme.desc: During the Korean War, North and South Korean soldiers confront at a fairy tale-like village Dongmakgol.

programme.title: Her Only Fan
programme.desc: There's a serial killer on the loose targeting cam girls. Blake and her friends are next on his list.

programme.title: Mary Proud
programme.desc: Mary Proud is a single mother who finds stardom as a rhythm and blues singer at a high personal price. Living in Ohio, Mary and her little sister are separated by social services after they are abandoned by their disturbed and drug-addicted mother. Years later, strong-willed Mary finds herself in a nasty divorce with Gary, an unfaithful husband and church deacon. Her determination to provide a better life for her two children and to make a career in the music industry pays off when she meets AC Wells, a successful music producer from Atlanta. After relocating to Atlanta, Mary's career takes off, but she encounters a fresh set of problems after starting a volatile relationship with a rapper on AC's label, and a new drug habit. Mary is admitted to a rehabilitation program, and later is diagnosed as bipolar. After completing rehab, Mary is determined to recover her damaged career and her life. Finally, Mary realizes a new personal success, achieved by working to change her life toward a healthy and positive direction.

programme.title: Married Men and Single Women
programme.desc: When three married men decide to step out on their marriages they get more than they bargained for. As each settle into lustful and emotional affairs with their mistresses, they soon find that infidelity has unpredictable and devastating consequences. Betrayal, hypocrisy, racism and several other matters surface as MARRIED MEN AND SINGLE WOMEN come together.

programme.title: More Than Friends
programme.desc: When Angela, a heterosexual, learns her friend, Tennille, loves her, she is surprised to find that she may feel the same.

programme.title: The Iceman
programme.desc: A hit man (Michael Shannon) keep his violent profession secret from his wife (Winona Ryder) and kids.

programme.title: The Accidental Husband
programme.desc: When a talk radio host advises one of her listeners to end her relationship, her jilted beau seeks revenge.

programme.title: Concrete Canyons
programme.desc: In this thrilling crime drama, a sheriff searches for his son who is accused of murder and on the run from the law.

programme.title: The Matthew Shepard Story
programme.desc: In this dramatization of an actual event, young Matthew Shepard (Shane Meier) is mercilessly slain by a pair of men who targeted their victim because of his homosexuality. Capital punishment looming, the killers' fate lies in the hands of Matthew's parents, Judy (Stockard Channing) and Dennis (Sam Waterston). As the grieving couple attempts to make the choice that will best serve Matthew's memory, they recount his rocky adolescence, lifelong struggle for acceptance and personal views on life.

programme.title: Thrill Seekers
programme.desc: When intrepid reporter Tom Merrick discovers that the same man appears in photographs of major disasters over a hundred-year period, he embarks on an incredible action-filled race against time to prevent a series of new disasters.

programme.title: Danger Beneath the Sea

programme.title: Taking Earth
programme.desc: The human race is thrown into chaos as an alien invasion takes control of the planet in an effort to find one boy out of seven billion people who holds the power to destroy them.

programme.title: Control

programme.title: Van Halen
programme.desc: VAN HALEN achieved worldwide fame for their many popular songs and larger-than-life stage performances they also became known for the drama surrounding the departures of former members. Controversy surrounded the band following the exits of Roth, Hagar, and Anthony this controversy often included numerous conflicting press statements between the former members and the band. In 2007, Van Halen was inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame. VH1 ranked them 7th on their list of the top 100 hard rock artists of all time. Using interviews, news archive and performance this episode reveals the unique aspect of this iconic band.

programme.title: Britney Spears
programme.desc: Filmed at Roundhouse, London, this concert film will give all fans a spectacular Live experience from start to finish. Britney Spears performs her hits including "Baby One More Time", "Oops! I Did It Again", "Toxic" and many more.

programme.title: Katy Perry
programme.desc: The Prismatic World Tour is a sensory explosion of eye-popping theatrics, daring acrobatics and of course, all the hits. This concert film is a visually stunning production that captures Katy's fun-loving personality and artistic vision. Spanning the entire length of the arena floor, the innovative Prismatic tour stage allows Katy to share intimate moments with her fans in a unique shared connection with the music. Directed for the stage in seven thematic acts, this unmissable spectacle features hit after hit after hit. The World Tour captures the excitement, color and energy of the live Katy Perry extravaganza.

programme.title: Destilando amor

programme.title: Destilando amor
programme.desc: Sofía se pone muy celosa al ver a Francisco borracho y cree que la engaña, pero él trata de convencerla de que no es así. Sanjuana va a buscar a Hilario, pero él la corre y le exige que se aleje de él.

programme.title: Destilando amor
programme.desc: Daniela le dice a Gaviota que está preocupada por Rodrigo, pues sabe que sufre por ella. Alonso y Rodrigo compiten para impresionar a Gaviota.

programme.title: Destilando amor
programme.desc: Sofía le reclama a Rodrigo por alejar a su familia por culpa de Gaviota, él le exige no entrometerse en su vida. Alonso hace un brindis por Gaviota y asegura que es una mujer increíble, ella se pone nerviosa al escuchar sus palabras.

programme.title: Destilando amor
programme.desc: Rodrigo lleva a Clarita al pueblo para sorprender a Gaviota en su cumpleaños. Minerva comienza a sospechar que Aarón la engaña de nuevo y le exige volver a su casa o confesará todo lo que sabe sobre él.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Juan regresa con sus hermanos, pero sigue sin recordarlos. Sofía le pide al comisario que detenga a Juan.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Leonora visita a Sofía para confirmarle que Juan llegó solo y sin memoria al monte. Juan está a punto de ser trasladado a la prisión de Puebla, pero Sofía retira los cargos en su contra.

programme.title: Marimar

programme.title: María, la del barrio

programme.title: María Mercedes

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Meche se pone triste al saber que Jorge Luis no asistirá a la fiesta de Rosario. La gente de la vecindad se prepara para la fiesta de Rosario y ayuda a Meche con los adornos. Rosario baila felizmente el vals principal con su padre.

programme.title: Marimar

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Efraín se pone celoso al ver a Consuelo interesada en otro hombre. Cynthia llora al saber que Rogelio no la entregará en el altar. Rogelio presenta a Margarito como su hijo ante el pueblo.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Cynthia le exige a Felipa saber la verdad sobre su pasado. Ulises descubre a Macaria besándose con Efraín. Cynthia sufre al saber que María es su verdadera madre.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Macaria le pide a Ulises que le de una nueva oportunidad para recuperar su matrimonio. Cynthia decide dejar atrás sus malos actos con Ana Paula. María decide irse de la hacienda para evitar que Cynthia la continúe humillando.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: María se llena de esperanza al ver cómo Cynthia comienza a interesarse en ella. Vanesa humilla a María al enterarse de que Cynthia es su hija.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Gustavo sospecha que Bruno es el verdadero culpable de todas las cosas malas que han sucedido en el pueblo. Gustavo idea un plan para demostrarle a todos que Bruno no es el hombre que dice ser.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Víctor le pide ayuda a Alejandro para escapar con Nadia a otro país y poder estar juntos para siempre. Adolfo se niega a asesinar a Anselmo y le pide a Ezequiel hacerlo.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Nadia le confiesa a Víctor que está embarazada y cuando Pedro se entere querrá quedarse con el bebé. Montserrat va a buscar a Angélica a su casa para despedirse de ella.

programme.title: El manantial
programme.desc: El doctor Luna se encuentra grave y Justo acude a la clínica. ¿Qué intenciones tendrá?

programme.title: El manantial
programme.desc: Héctor conversa con Malena sobre el baúl hallado en El manantial, que prueba que Eloísa fue asesinada. Justo arriba a Piedras Grandes.

programme.title: El manantial
programme.desc: Alfonsina y Alejandro cancelan el divorcio, pero Bárbara les impide celebrarlo. Justo busca vengarse.

programme.title: El manantial
programme.desc: El padre Salvador sabe que su sobrina fue secuestrada y viaja de regreso a San Andrés. ¿Quién dará con su paradero?

programme.title: El manantial
programme.desc: Justo muere y en San Andrés hay cierta tranquilidad. Alfonsina y Héctor reciben el testamento. El padre Salvador casa a Alfonsina y Alejandro.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Rogelio le promete a Ana Paula que la ayudará a que Miguel no vaya a prisión. Ernesto le deja en claro a Gustavo que Ana Paula sigue enamorada de Rogelio. Gustavo sospecha que Bruno es uno de los involucrados de su secuestro.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Vanesa y Bruno enfurecen al saber que la hacienda de Rogelio no se pude comprar. Ana Paula decide continuar con el juicio en contra de Vanesa para poder recuperar su herencia. Gustavo enfrenta a Rogelio y le dice que luchará por el amor de Ana Paula.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludoviquito se lleva el carro sin el permiso de Ludovico, lo choca y su padre deberá pagar la reparación. Ludoviquito comienza a robar partes de autos cuando su padre lo castiga.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico y Federica reciben una invitación para ir a una reunión de ex alumnos en la preparatoria. Federica le inventa a sus ex compañeras que Ludovico es un importante médico.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: El patrón le dice a Cipriano que un reportero va a ir al hotel. Anita cree que el reportero está muerto y un investigador va al hotel, cuando descubren que el reportero no murió, el investigador lo arresta por cometer muchas infracciones.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: El patrón le llama a Cipriano y le dice que uno de sus amigos hará su fiesta en el hotel y él piensa que es Serapio, cuando descubre que se equivocó, se arrepiente de haber pagado todo.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: El dueño del hotel le habla a Cipriano para avisarle que grabarán unas escenas para una telenovela. El actor Amalio recibe una suite para que la use como camerino. Carmelo interrumpe una escena para darles unos consejos a los actores.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: Cipriano hace una reunión y le informa a los empleados que el hotel recibirá a una convención de cirqueros. El Vitor conoce a un payaso, él le cuenta la historia de su triste vida y Vitor decide ayudarlo siendo parte de su show.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: Cirpriano les dice a los empleados que tienen que desalojar el hotel porque lo van a renovar. Los empleados dicen que desempeñan muy bien su trabajo y que es injusto que no les paguen.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Albertano y Vítor conocen a dos mujeres que les hacen creer que están interesadas en ellos, pero solo quieren su dinero.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Vítor acepta tener una cita con una mujer casada y usa a Albertano para distraer a su amiga, pero el esposo de la mujer aparece y tienen que fingir tener una relación.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Dada su experiencia como chofer de microbuses, ahora que es rico, Vítor decide convertirse en piloto de carreras y, con Albertano, crea la escudería "Los Guapos".

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Natasha se encuentra con una presuntuosa y molesta excompañera de la escuela. Vítor y Albertano deciden hacer pasar a Natasha por una exitosa millonaria que vive rodeada de lujos y servidumbre para poner a la presumida en su lugar.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Vítor y Albertano deciden que lo suyo es ser jefes, y por ello compran una fábrica para producir accesorios para automóvil.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: En su búsqueda por trabajo, Albertano es contratado por María de todos los Ángeles pero sucede una tragedia que Rosa Aurora tendrá que arreglar.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Los niños del barrio apedrean a Ofertín con Albertano dentro. El chino tiene una fiesta y doña Lucha invita a Nayeli. María va a un centro nocturno con sus amigas pero sus acompañantes las dejan con la cuenta.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: León e Inés enfrentan a Javier por haber sido expulsado de su colegio. Alma termina con Franco ya que ella se siente rechazada. Roberta y Diego planean enviar de viaje a Mía y a Miguel para que ella no se entere del rumor.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Alma acepta casarse con Franco. Roberta descubre quién es su verdadero padre. Mía se entera de lo que pasó entre Miguel y Sabrina de boca de Celina. Miguel le confiesa a Franco lo que ocurrió con Sabrina.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mía le pide a Franco que la cambie a otra escuela. León le ordena a Diego que cuide a Javier ahora que ingresó al colegio Elite. Mía regresa al colegio para reclamarles a Celina y a Victoria no haberle dicho sobre la infidelidad de Miguel.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Sabrina le confiesa a Miguel que no está embarazada Diego golpea a Javier, y León lo ve Mia le dice a Miguel que lo perdona, pero su relación no puede seguir Diego le asegura a Roberta que no robó su diario Mia y Roberta quieren dejar RBD.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Diego anuncia que RBD se va de gira, pero las chicas deciden no ir por Mia. Reverte logra que los alumnos ganen el primer lugar del intercolegial, y Roberta se molesta porque dice que se hace el héroe.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Pascual le dice a Reverte que tendrá que acompañar a los alumnos a su viaje. Franco se molesta con Alma por autorizar la salida de Mia del colegio para la gira de RBD. Javier le sugiere a León ir a la playa con sus compañeros del Elite.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Alma le pregunta a Franco si está seguro de terminar con ella Diego asegura que su papá está en Nueva York y no sabrá que están de gira Miguel no sabe cómo decirle a Mia que Sabrina es la fotógrafa oficial de RBD Sol abandona a Celina en la selva.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Eva le pide a Juan que cuide de los chismes del pueblo. Fernando se pelea con Juan por Sofía. Franco le aconseja a Juan que se vaya lejos del pueblo.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Rosario se pone triste al saber que no volverá a ver a su hijo. Juan se pierde en el alcohol para poder olvidar a Sofía. Ximena le pide a Oscar que se casen cuanto antes.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Eva se sincera con Sofía y habla sobre el gran amor que le tuvo a su padre. Sofía se entera que Eva tuvo una hija de su padre.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Fernando trata de convencer a Gabriela de que no permita a Sofía entrar a la administración de la hacienda. Sofía se despide de Juan para siempre.

programme.title: Muchacha italiana viene a casarse
programme.desc: Fiorella le confiesa a Pedro que está enamorada de él, pero cuando están a punto de besarse Dante los interrumpe. Vittorio le dice a Fiorella que la boda será en un mes y ella se desmaya.

programme.title: Muchacha italiana viene a casarse
programme.desc: Eloísa le pregunta a Gael qué pasó entre Pedro y Osvaldo, y él le dice que Osvaldo le disparó a propósito. Pedro regaña a Fiorella por pasar tiempo con Vittorio en el jardín en horas laborales.

programme.title: Muchacha italiana viene a casarse
programme.desc: Julieta le asegura a Eloísa que Fiorella le quiere hacer daño por haber discutido con ella. Pedro y Benito ayudan a Fiorella a esconderse de Dante.

programme.title: Muchacha italiana viene a casarse
programme.desc: Diana le llama a la policía para informarle dónde está escondida Fiorella. Pedro encuentra la evidencia para demostrar que Fiorella es inocente. Unos hombres tratan de abusar de Gianna y Gael logra rescatarla.

programme.title: Gavilán o paloma
programme.desc: José José muestra la realidad de la vida de una estrella y cómo la fama, el dinero, y los placeres pueden destruirlo.

programme.title: Santo y Blue Demon en la Atlántida
programme.desc: Un científico nazi, usando la ciudad perdida de Atlantis como su base de operaciones, amenaza con destruir la civilización con una bomba nuclear. El científico nazi quiere que el Tercer Reich empiece a gobernar de nuevo y si sus demandas no se cumplen, él seguirá adelante con su amenaza de aniquilación nuclear. Con muy poco tiempo que perder, Santo es enlistado para encontrar la bomba nuclear, desarmarla y poner fin al plan diabólico del científico nazi.

programme.title: El increíble profesor Zovek
programme.desc: El profesor Sovek se enfrenta a un doctor que puede controlar las mentes humanas y quiere apoderarse del planeta.

programme.title: El capitán Mantarraya
programme.desc: El capitán de un pequeño bote narra sus interesantes aventuras en el mar a un grupo de niños de su aldea.

programme.title: Gregorio y Su Ángel
programme.desc: En México, un anciano (Broderick Crawford) alcohólico hace amistad con una niña pequeña que es como un ángel.

programme.title: Calabacitas tiernas
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, Tin Tan se relaciona con un pícaro empresario arruinado que lo hace pasar por sí mismo para evitar dar la cara ante sus acreedores. En su nueva personalidad, Tin Tan monta un espectáculo musical con hermosas chicas.

programme.title: Ferias de México
programme.desc: Durante una feria un niño huérfano salva de un tramposo a un jugador y éste lo adopta y lo cría junto con su hija.

programme.title: La juventud se impone
programme.desc: Dos amigos estudian en la universidad y cantan en un café, ambos se empeñan en casar a sus respectivos padres.

programme.title: Las señoritas Vivanco
programme.desc: Dos hermanas solteronas creen que cometer un robo deja de ser considerado como pecado, después de ir a la confesión.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Al peligro con tiento y al remedio con tiempo
programme.desc: Lucía es una adolescente que vive con su mamá, pero ella es tan estricta que prefiere vivir con su papá. Sin embargo, no imagina que él aún está en el tiempo de la fiesta y las mujeres.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Quien por malos caminos anda, malos abrojos halla
programme.desc: Una joven y su padre sufren un asalto y al intentar proteger a su hija él le dispara al ladrón. Los hijos del ladrón deciden vengarse del asesino de su padre, pero el hermano menor no está de acuerdo a lo que se dedica su familia.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Una mujer sufre un asalto y su pareja le aconseja que vaya a poner una denuncia, pero ella teme hacerlo. La policía logra atrapar al ladrón que asaltó a la mujer, pero por falta de pruebas queda libre.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Una caída más es una caída menos
programme.desc: Xitlali vive con su papá. En la escuela, algunos de sus compañeros le quieren enseñar a tomar y fumar, pero una maestra se da cuenta y la manda a que asista a clases de box. Sin embargo, a su padre no le parece bien que aprenda ese deporte.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Al peligro con tiento y al remedio con tiempo
programme.desc: Lucía es una adolescente que vive con su mamá, pero ella es tan estricta que prefiere vivir con su papá. Sin embargo, no imagina que él aún está en el tiempo de la fiesta y las mujeres.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Juventud sin salud, más amarga que la senectud
programme.desc: Una joven siente que su mamá no la quiere y solo se preocupa por la salud de su hermana gemela. Cuando un chico se fija en su hermana, la joven comienza a molestarla provocando que sufra un ataque, como consecuencia, la joven cambiará totalmente.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Yerros de amor, dignos son de perdón
programme.desc: Yolanda es novia de Pedro y durante su noviazgo queda embarazada, pero no logra encontrar el momento para darle la noticia. Él y su hermano se van de fiesta y tienen un accidente automovilístico uno de ellos fallece.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Más vale pedir perdón que pedir permiso
programme.desc: Desde niño, Pepe ha pensado que su mamá había muerto. Conoce a una mujer mayor, de la cual piensa que se ha enamorado, sin saber que el destino le tiene preparado una fuerte noticia que cambiará su vida.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Los Irresistibles son el primer escuadrón en pasar a la semifinal. El grupo Megabait presenta su primer video musical.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: La primera parte de la semifinal comienza.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Segunda parte de la semifinal.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Intimidación e insultos racistas, amenazas y ataques físicos. Letreros racistas pintados en las paredes, pareciera no haber lugar seguro. Una nueva realidad se está viviendo en muchos vecindarios, familias viviendo bajo el miedo.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Alrededor de 50 jóvenes de un mismo vecindario recibieron acusaciones de homicidios que los marcaron para siempre.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.sub-title: Edición especial supremacistas: Las redes del odio
programme.desc: Se muestran a los nuevos supremacistas y se analiza la manera en la que utilizan los medios sociales para atraer a nuevos miembros.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Una mujer de buen corazón es asesinada por su esposo, un hombre manipulador y frío quien dejó abandonada a su propia hija en los brazos de su madre fallecida.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: El tiempo parece moverse en cámara lenta para familiares, amigos y conocidos de personas que han sido víctimas de diferentes crímenes que, desgraciadamente, muchas veces no logran ser resueltos.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Algunos fueron perseguidos y separados de sus familias, otros llevados a campos de concentración y exterminados, hoy, algunos de los sobrevivientes narran el horror del holocausto judío.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom visits a remarkable motorcycle collection in Staten Island, NY, filled with Harley-Davidson, Indian, and Vincent motorcycles. In her kitchen, those eggs are an inspiration for a Oaxacan-themed breakfast.

programme.title: Boys with Toys
programme.desc: Matt is eager to work his way onto Sonia's coveted airplane repo, despite her adamancy against him.

programme.title: Mile High Mayhem
programme.desc: On this special season finale of Operation Repo, the team gears up for a mile high repo of a lifetime! Froy and Sonia repo a water blob from a lake house, but the RO and his friends refuse to let this deflate their party. And with Sonia's hands tied, she is forced to offer Matt a position on the airplane. The team takes to the skies, but when plans go awry will Matt make the ultimate sacrifice for the team? Or will his ego force everything to spiral violently out of control?

programme.title: Reclaim the Plane
programme.desc: In the premiere of the final season of Operation Repo, the team must recover an airplane and return one-hundred thousand dollars. But after two members of the team bail when it's time to save the company, will the others be able to bounce back in time to avoid a jail sentence?

programme.title: First Rule of Repo
programme.desc: Froy and Sonia encounter a city employee who tries to give them the boot, and a mechanic's shady scheme comes crashing down on Matt and Ronnie. But with Froy still in debt to Sonia, an RO's offer to make a quick buck convinces Froy to break the first rule of repo.

programme.title: Natural Liar
programme.desc: First, Froy and Ronnie dodge tomatoes and pesticide when an organic farmer won't give up his tractor, and when they are in the clear, Froy confronts Ronnie about telling Sonia about the boob purchase and inadvertently reveals the Lambo repo. Next, Carlos and Matt get an offer of stardom from a slick Hollywood agent. And finally, Sonia drags more information from Ronnie and doesn't understand why everyone's going behind her back with Froy's big Lambo repo. Plus, they lose control of a Chevy Impala while repoing from a mace wielding shopper.

programme.title: The Froylan Job
programme.desc: A hoarder with a secret tries to pull a fast one on Matt and Froy, and Sonia takes sides in a dramatic lover's quarrel. Froy finally gets a shot at recovering the Lamborghini, but will his ingenious plan come crashing down around him?

programme.title: Tricks and Treats
programme.desc: First, a mischievous magician gets Ronnie and Carlos to stick together when they interrupt his show to grab his car. Next, Froy and Ronnie have to put hands on a seriously stupid sugar daddy and the recently upgraded debtor's chest when they repo from a stripper who will do anything to keep her car. And finally, Matt and Carlos go head to head against a boxing manager and his fight fixing fighter.

programme.title: Now Serving Mrs. Pizarro
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy discuss what they will do with their severance pay once the company is sold, but have to put discussion on hold while they repo repo a hovercraft golf cart from a snooty golfer. Next, Sonia and Ronnie's easy day at the salon gets disastrous when the should-be debtor serves Sonia with a lawsuit. And finally, Froy and Carlos head out to a worksite to repo the bulldozer that Carlos should have been training for.

programme.title: Taken for a Ride
programme.desc: A professional stunt driver slips through Froy and Sonia's grasp, sending them on a violent high speed chase. Matt offends a pretty RO who seeks womanly revenge, and Froy and Carlos go undercover at a lowrider show. And when Sonia announces a dangerous plan to save the company from the lawsuit, the team must decide whether they're willing to risk it all.

programme.title: The Final Finale
programme.desc: On this special one hour series finale of Operation Repo, the team are scrambling to get ready for the huge Yacht repo to secure the sale of the company and the distribution of their severance packages, while still going after every day repos. In this episode, Sonia and Froy find a payment procrastinating pervert in the park, Matt and Ronnie put the brakes on a rich racecar driver, Matt and Carlos get stuck in the middle of sign maker's gluing process, and Ronnie and Carlos try to reason with an irresponsible retro racist. And finally, on their most dangerous repo ...

programme.title: It Ain't No Joke!
programme.desc: In this kick-off to the final season, the cast takes viewers back through the most outrageous, comical, and memorable repos of the series. And, get a sneak peek of the final season of Operation Repo.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: After we meet the team members of Operation Repo, Matt, Lou, and Froy get interrupted by a bike riding gangster while trying to hook up a car. And later, Matt, Sonia, and Froy deal with an ecstatic and energetic young debtor who will not let go of her car.

programme.title: Don't You Dare Lift-off
programme.desc: First, Froy, Matt, and Lou turn tail and bail when bats and guns are swung towards them. Later, things get heated for Matt and Sonia just before they head out with Esteban and Lou to ambush a helicopter pilot.

programme.title: Collectibles
programme.desc: First, Lou, Lyndah, and Matt head to a cul-de-sac to gain possession of a speedboat, and a truck, and a trailer. Later, a rare collectible motorcycle is up for repo, and Matt, Lou, and Froy are ready to collect it. And finally, Froy, Sonia, and Lou nab a forklift from a threat-dealing debtor.

programme.title: Foodwise
programme.desc: Beijing is a 3000-year old metropolis home to a dizzying array of culinary traditions, not least of which is vegetarian cuisine. For Beijingers, eating vegetarian is the best way to welcome spring. Today, Tianran and Angela take up the challenge.

programme.title: Foodwise
programme.desc: From feasts of tofu made using well-water and fish caught fresh from the reservoir, to bubbling cauldrons of thinly-sliced lamb, the hilly suburbs of Beijing are home to some of the best-loved weekend escapes, and they're all by the Great Wall.

programme.title: Foodwise

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Now that I've arrived in Ithaki, it's time to explore what this ruggedly beautiful island has to offer. It might be small, but sure packs a punch. Because it is so tiny, it's easy to see a whole lot in a little bit of time.

Art helps | Liana Finck

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | The Final Countdown
programme.desc: When bad weather strikes, most people head in doors, but we head right into the heart of it. And now you can too, experiencing every thunderbolt, every dust storm, and every flood, all from the comfort of your own home. Let's jump right in!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Slip and Mudslide
programme.desc: Rain. Snow. Lightning. Hurricanes. Dust devils. When these weather phenomena combine, it's usually a recipe for disaster. But on this show, it's just another normal day in the books. It's time for Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Earth, Wind, and Wildfire
programme.desc: We always take weather for granted, but when Mother Nature turns up the heat, she forces us to pay attention. From terrifying twisters to radical rain, we've got it all....and over the next half hour, you'll see 25 of the most insane weather ever caught on camera. Get comfortable, because you're about to experience Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Dust Devils in the Wind
programme.desc: Weather is an unrelenting force, tearing through our lives and homes, with no regard for the human condition. But lucky for us, these humans have been conditioned to take out their phones and record whatever is happening, letting us relive the experiences again and again. And when it comes to weather that is out of the ordinary, that's truly where we come alive. Strap in, because you're about to get hit by an Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard has her aim set on The Beast, but firing her attorney, Sophia Lopez, creates unexpected obstacles between her and her target. The Disciplinarian and Samantha Smart aim to take away the sunshine from new WOW competitor, Cali Ray. The relationship between Jessie Jones and Amber O'Neal is tested. And The Psycho Sisters, Razor and Fury accompanied by Mezmeriah continue down their unpredictable path of destruction towards the WOW Tag Team Championship Titles.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard discovers hidden terms in her legal contract with the World's Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez. Ms. Lopez is seemingly playing a final hand by forcing a legally bound Tessa Blanchard into a match against a deadly mystery opponent. Adrenaline appears critically injured from being jumped by Exile and as such, her WOW World Tag Team Champion partner Fire is taking a stand. But it turns out the scorned Exile members aren't the only WOW Superheroes willing to deceive and harm the champs in pursuit of the tag team championship titles. Impressive newcomer and barrel riding champ, Casey Dakota makes her in ring debut. And the long history of battles that have ensued between The Psycho Sisters and The Dark Side members: Holidead, Siren, and the possessed Princess Aussie culminate into an all out war, resulting in the most shocking act that has ever taken place in WOW.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: Tonight has “feud” written all over it with two of The Fabulous Lana Star's past prodigies joining forces to teach Lana and her newest prodigy a lesson. Will the ghosts of Lana's past haunt her in the ring forever or does she have a plan to prevail? Tessa Blanchard's shocking disqualification from last week's battle with Venomous costs her much desired championship rematch against The Beast. The Dixie Darlings make a peace offering to Jessie Jones. And Stephy Slays bravely takes up for her friend against The Temptress and The Dagger who attacked Keta Rush in the alley.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: Will the spirit of The Lioness be killed by last week's attack or will she demonstrate the resolve to continue? Jessie Jones uses the Dixie Darlings and a tactical argument to secure a shot at the WOW Tag Team Championship Titles. The events between The Psycho Sisters and The Dark Side: Holidead, Siren, and Princess Aussie have been escalating for weeks. Fury and Mezmeriah take to the ring to defend Razor after Siren set fire to her face in an unsanctioned brawl. And an unexpected competitor wants to join The Psycho Sisters.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: With Keta Rush injured, can Stephy Slays find a new partner to help end Exile's reign of brutality? The Psycho Sister's leader Razor was taken out by a vicious and fiery attack last week. WOW veteran Spike joins forces to help even the odds against Holidead, Siren, and Princess Aussie. The Lioness returns to the ring for the first time since suffering humiliation and betrayal at the hands of Lana Star and Team Blondage. Former WOW World Champion, Tessa Blanchard is hungrier than ever for her shot at The Beast, but she must first claim victory in tonight's Number One Contender match against a treacherous competitor.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: Under suspicious and unusual circumstances, The WOW World Tag Team Championship is on the line tonight. Who will walk away with the most prestigious tag team titles in women's wrestling? New WOW Superhero Adriana Gambino denies allegations made against her family while making her in-ring debut. And the IQ Superior, Samantha Smart employs a new “hands on” strategy with The Disciplinarian.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: Champion Santana Garrett wants revenge on Tessa Blanchard for what she did to her beloved father. Jungle Grrrl reminds Santana that she never pinned her shoulders to the mat to become Champion. Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard gets what she wants...a shot at the Championship. It is a triple threat match that you won't want to miss!

programme.title: My Road To WOW — The Secrets Of The Superheroes
programme.desc: In MY ROAD TO WOW, the stars of Women Of Wrestling reveal the challenges they had to overcome – and how WOW gave them the inspiration and passion for wrestling, and the drive to become WOW Superheroes.
